nav.privacy_on_tooltip: Privacy mode on — coordinates are fuzzed

status.label: Status
status.draft_help: Draft nodes are visible only to you and excluded from others' path planning.

form.name: Name
form.privacy_warning: Privacy mode active — coordinates are visible in this form but hidden elsewhere.
form.clutter_help: Sets the obstacle height used in the RF coverage simulation (SPLAT! -gc flag).
form.clutter_auto_help: "Auto" queries ESA WorldCover land-cover data for this location.
form.lora_help: Must match the preset configured on the physical device. Affects SNR calculations in path finding.

messages.still_computing: Coverage is still computing, please wait...
messages.comp_failed: Coverage computation failed for this node

path.title: Path Planner
path.login_required: Login to use the path planner.
path.intro: Select two nodes as endpoints. The planner finds the best relay path through the mesh, maximising the worst-hop SNR (bottleneck). SPLAT! terrain data is used where available.
path.stale_warning: Nodes have changed since this path was computed.
path.low_snr_warning: Low bottleneck SNR — consider adding relay nodes.

messages.find_failed: Failed to find path. Please try again.

activity.title: Activity Feed
activity.empty_help: Create or update a node to see events here.

jobs.title: Coverage Jobs
jobs.empty_help: Click a node's coverage button to start a computation.

try.page_subtitle: See how far your LoRa node could reach — no sign-up required.
try.share_tip: Anyone opening this link will see the same simulation re-run with your settings.
try.join_detail: Like what you see? Add your node to the Metro Olografix mesh and help expand coverage for everyone.

location.instruction: Click anywhere on the map to place your node.
location.tip: Higher locations with a clear view of the sky give much better range — rooftops and hilltops are ideal.

device.instruction: Choose the hardware you own or plan to buy.
device.tip: More sensitive receivers can pick up weaker signals from farther away. If you're unsure, pick a recommended device.
device.recommended_hint: Not sure? Start with one of our recommended devices:

setup.height_tip: Each floor is roughly 3 meters. A rooftop installation dramatically increases range.
setup.environment_tip: Buildings and trees absorb and scatter radio waves. Open hilltops have the least obstruction.
setup.range_tip: Longer range means slower data transfer. 'Balanced' is recommended for most uses.

results.computing: Analysing terrain and computing RF propagation…
results.legend_detail: Coloured areas show where your signal could be received. Gaps are caused by terrain obstructions.

errors.rate_limit: You've reached the limit of {limit} simulations per hour. Please try again later.
errors.busy: The server is busy with other simulations. Please try again in a minute.
errors.failed: The simulation failed. Please try again.
errors.no_location: Please select a location on the map first.
